case_title: ARIKAWA, DWAYNE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIKAWA, DWAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-09-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 5/9/06 3:30 P.M, PLAINTIFF TO EFFECT PROOF OF SERVICE AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE IN TIMELY FASHION.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ARIKAWA, DWAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2006 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-13-2006, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-28-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE CITY NEEDS ADDITIONAL TIME TO INVESTIGATE THIS CLAIM.
MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BY DEFT.(CITY ATTY.'S OFC);FOLDER AT 506,TO TRAY.
